name: navigator-vms
description: Navigator VMS — run scripts from the repo root

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix web
scripts.dev:next: node scripts/ensure-stack.mjs && npm run predev:api && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui:proxy"
scripts.dev:full:host: node scripts/ensure-stack.mjs && npm run predev:api && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:host:proxy"
scripts.docker:infra: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose up -d postgres redis
scripts.dev:host:proxy: cross-env API_PORT=3000 npm run dev:host --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:ui:proxy: cross-env API_PORT=3000 npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:docker: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose up --build --remove-orphans -d postgres redis web worker && node scripts/wait-postgres.mjs && node scripts/wait-api.mjs && cross-env VMS_SKIP_API_CHECK=true npm run dev:host:proxy
scripts.docker:up: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose up --build --remove-orphans -d postgres redis web worker
scripts.docker:reseed: npm run docker:infra && node scripts/wait-postgres.mjs && npm run seed
scripts.docker:reset: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose down && docker compose up --build --remove-orphans -d postgres redis web worker && node scripts/wait-postgres.mjs && npm run seed
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix web
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix web
